reforms.description: The Polish government approved the Entrepreneurship-Development-Employment medium term plan aimed at enhancing real GDP growth from 1% to 5% by 2004, focusing on reducing administrative burdens and promoting infrastructure investment to support the expansion of entrepreneurial firms and infrastructure development.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The plan aims to stimulate economic growth by fostering entrepreneurship and reducing barriers for businesses.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan has been approved and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in the approach to entrepreneurship and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: The government’s Entrepreneurship-Development-Employment programme explicitly recognises the need to promote the expansion of entrepreneurial firms, infrastructure development and reducing Poland’s exceptionally high unemployment rate.

reforms.description: The government established a unified entrepreneurs’ electronic registry system to improve SMEs’ access to credit and streamline business registration processes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The system enhances access to credit for SMEs, facilitating their growth and operational efficiency.
reforms.status_evidence: The electronic registry system is operational and aiding SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is a narrower adjustment within the broader entrepreneurship development strategy.
reforms.source_quote: The government established a unified entrepreneurs’ electronic registry system for new enterprises.

reforms.description: The authorities are considering measures to simplify the tax compliance process for small firms, including proposals to reduce the number of required tax documents.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Simplifying tax compliance can reduce administrative burdens on small firms, potentially enhancing their operational efficiency.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures are under consideration and have not yet been implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is an incremental adjustment aimed at improving the business environment for small firms.
reforms.source_quote: The government’s Entrepreneurship First of All includes proposals to simplify the monthly preparation and submission of tax documents.
